title: Godrej Appliances is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Appliances is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
